goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:15' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:15 and should leave on tuesday
The train should depart from ely and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
